description: Clario 360 executive business metrics — cross-suite KPIs for Cyber, Data, Lex, Acta, Visus, AI Governance, and platform reliability.

panels.description: Total API gateway requests received today (since midnight UTC).
panels.title: Total Requests Today

panels.description: Platform uptime percentage over the last 30 days based on successful gateway responses.
panels.title: Platform Uptime (30d)

panels.description: Current overall cyber risk score. Lower is better.
panels.title: Cyber Risk Score

panels.description: Current data quality score across all pipelines. Higher is better.
panels.title: Data Quality Score

panels.description: Cyber suite health: current risk score and total open vulnerabilities.
panels.title: Cyber

panels.description: Data suite health: quality score and pipeline run totals.
panels.title: Data

panels.description: Lex suite health: total contracts under management and contracts expiring within 7 days.
panels.title: Lex

panels.description: Acta suite health: total meetings tracked and overdue action items.
panels.title: Acta

panels.description: Distribution of API requests across suites over the selected time range.
panels.title: Requests by Suite

panels.description: Stacked area chart showing request activity trend across all suites.
panels.title: Activity Trend (Stacked)

panels.description: Current cyber risk score as a gauge. Green < 30, Yellow < 60, Orange < 80, Red >= 80.
panels.title: Risk Score

panels.description: Number of active critical severity detection alerts.
panels.title: Active Critical Alerts

panels.description: Mean Time To Remediate vulnerabilities, in hours, trended over time.
panels.title: MTTR Trend (hours)

panels.description: Total number of assets currently tracked by the cyber suite.
panels.title: Total Assets

panels.description: Current data quality score as a gauge. Values are 0-100%.
panels.title: Quality Score

panels.description: Percentage of pipeline runs that succeeded vs. total runs over the selected time range.
panels.title: Pipeline Success Rate

panels.description: Total number of data sources currently connected to the platform.
panels.title: Sources Connected

panels.description: Total data contradictions detected, indicating conflicting data across sources.
panels.title: Contradictions

panels.description: Breakdown of contracts by status: total, with clause extraction counts.
panels.title: Contracts Status

panels.description: Trend of contracts expiring within 7 days. Spikes indicate upcoming renewal pressure.
panels.title: Expiring Contracts Trend

panels.description: Action items by status: open, completed, in-progress.
panels.title: Action Items by Status

panels.description: Trend of overdue action items over time. Rising trend indicates process bottlenecks.
panels.title: Overdue Items Trend

panels.description: Total number of AI models registered and monitored on the platform.
panels.title: AI Models Registered

panels.description: Model drift score trend over time. High drift indicates model degradation requiring retraining.
panels.title: Model Drift Score Trend

panels.description: Rate of AI predictions being served across all models.
panels.title: Predictions Rate

panels.description: Platform availability over the last 30 days as a gauge. Target: 99.95%.
panels.title: Uptime (30d)

panels.description: Error budget remaining based on a 99.95% SLO over a 30-day rolling window. Shows how much error budget has been consumed.
panels.title: Error Budget Remaining (SLO 99.95%)

panels.description: 95th percentile latency trend for all gateway requests.
panels.title: P95 Latency Trend

title: Clario 360 — Business Metrics
